codeReview.summary: Implementation covers the foundation requirements: warm weighted palette and typography hierarchy in global styles, Berkeley Mono as primary typeface, six-page navigation, footer links to modernminuteman.net and fieldcompany.org, and mobile navigation behavior via responsive CSS + toggle script. No blocking code defects were found in the reviewed commit.

sharedStateObservations.observation: The design-worker procedure was marked as followed, but transcript evidence shows required steps were skipped (reference-site study and manual dev-server verification). This suggests a process-compliance signaling gap between SKILL.md expectations and recorded execution/feedback.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: SKILL.md step 3 requires FetchUrl review of retinaa/usgraphics/tripleaughtdesign and step 6 requires manual dev-server verification. Transcript skeleton for workerSessionId 1d432f13-2a02-49bc-8845-9107ffcc7250 shows no FetchUrl calls and no dev-server run; handoff.skillFeedback.followedProcedure is true.

summary: Reviewed feature design-system-foundation at commit cf52f70b6620e287bfd497218d8152bf5bfb0a1a. The core design-system and layout requirements are met and the feature passes code review; one non-blocking shared-state observation was recorded about skill-procedure compliance tracking.
